name: Ni-ki || Nishimura Riki
description:
🦠Crawl through the holes in the evidence

Where evil has taken up residence

No faith in what red and white will say

They save the truth for a rainy day🦠

Tell me he ain't rocking Leon Kennedy vibes.

Tw: zombies, gore, violence

Not dead dove, but expect some gore and violence. Head the horror tag, pookies.

Ni-ki is our first in the Resident Evil series. Not all idols will fit this series, obviously, and this isn't specific to Enhypen. If you want an idol to be done in this series, leave a review!

(From ENHYPEN)
creator: ateez2023
